content: Delegated Phase 2 build prompt generation to Planning Lead for arb-polymarket and arb-kalshi connectors
Planning Lead gathered full context (all arb-types source, connector stubs, SPEC sections 6.2/6.3, architecture plan Phase 2, gaps G1/G3/G5) and delegated to Architect

Architect produced phase2-build-prompts.md with 9 prompts (1 workspace setup + 4 polymarket + 4 kalshi), 7 design decisions, 18 new files planned, gap resolutions for G1/G3/G5. Includes detailed auth specs (HMAC+EIP-712 for Poly, RSA for Kalshi), dual rate limiters, WebSocket reconnection, mock connectors, and comprehensive test requirements.
